mircap mircap
version 0
module 1 data_addr_dynamic_oob
type 1 u32
type 2 addr32
symbol 1 main function
symbol 2 global0 data
data 2 100 2a2b2c2d 0
function 1 1 - 1 5 0 2,1,1,1,1
func_block 1 1
block 1 1 1 2 3 4
insn 1 const_u32 r:1 u:5
insn 2 data_addr r:0 s:2 v:1
insn 3 const_u32 r:2 u:0
insn 4 ret v:2
